explanations: An open profile was selected, so the open-form families apply.
A C-form open profile was selected; lip condition decides the terminal code.
One stiffening lip fold per flange: open C lipped, OCL.
Geometry parameters, CanonicalGeometryID computation, and GSID lookup are outside Phase 1 scope; gsid is emitted as null.
designation: SMHE OCL (dimensions not captured in Phase 1)

db_mapping.note: Registered identifiers are issued by the SMHE registry, never by this tool.
